ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-01-2020 Continued To Jul-29-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Shelton appeared by telephone for Judith Livermore (Administrator).

The Court asked if Mr. Shelton is from the same firm as Ms. Phillips. Mr. Shelton stated that Ms. Phillips no longer works at his office, that he should be the Attorney of record and that he will file something with the Court. Mr. Shelton also stated that they ran into some real estate issues and requested a continuance so that he can get an appropriate petition on file. Status on close of estate is continued to July 29, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.
